name: Historical npm Supply Chain Attacks
description: Known npm supply chain compromises, typosquats, and malicious packages

malicious_packages.name: event-stream
malicious_packages.notes: flatmap-stream injected into event-stream 3.3.6 to steal bitcoin from Copay wallet users

malicious_packages.name: flatmap-stream
malicious_packages.notes: Malicious package injected into event-stream dependency chain

malicious_packages.name: ua-parser-js
malicious_packages.notes: Compromised versions dropped crypto miner and credential stealer

malicious_packages.name: coa
malicious_packages.notes: npm account hijacked, malicious versions published with credential stealer

malicious_packages.name: colors
malicious_packages.notes: Author intentionally broke package with infinite loop (protest). Supply chain disruption.

malicious_packages.name: faker
malicious_packages.notes: Author intentionally corrupted faker 6.6.6 with gibberish output

malicious_packages.name: node-ipc
malicious_packages.notes: Author added geopolitical sabotage: wipes files if geolocated to Russia/Belarus

malicious_packages.name: eslint-scope
malicious_packages.notes: Compromised version stole npm credentials from ~/.npmrc

malicious_packages.name: cross-env
malicious_packages.notes: Typosquat 'crossenv' (no hyphen) was the malicious version; separate from the legitimate package

malicious_packages.name: crossenv
malicious_packages.notes: Typosquat of cross-env. ALL versions malicious. Harvested env vars.

malicious_packages.name: jest-config
malicious_packages.notes: Typosquat of jest. ALL versions suspicious.

malicious_packages.name: bootstrap-sass
malicious_packages.notes: Malicious version published to npm (separate from legitimate RubyGem). Collected env vars.

malicious_packages.name: getcookies
malicious_packages.notes: Published as dependency of mailparser-sync, harvested HTTP cookies from web servers

malicious_packages.name: electron-native-notify
malicious_packages.notes: Backdoor targeting Agama wallet, remote code execution

malicious_packages.name: bb-builder
malicious_packages.notes: Typosquat of popular package, credential harvesting

network_iocs.context: Commonly used for payload staging in npm attacks
